\tzpentry{ID3322}{Encode Permittivity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3322 introduces Encode Permittivity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} ( \epsilon \circ \varepsilon_{ \text{encode}}) \circ ( \varepsilon_{ \text{encode}} \circ \eta) &= \text{Id}_{ \varepsilon_{ \text{encode}}} \\ ( \delta_{ \text{decode}} \circ \epsilon) \circ ( \eta \circ \delta_{ \text{decode}}) &= \text{Id}_{ \delta_{ \text{decode}}} \end{align}
